raw_consumer_statement:
I placed an order through Macys website ( Order # XXXX ), and the items were marked as delivered via UPS. However, I never received the package, and the delivery photo provided by UPS does not show a unit number or clear address, only a generic image of a blue door. I live in a large community where all units have blue doors, so there is no way to verify where the packages were actually delivered. 

I contacted Macys customer service multiple times by phone and spoke to several representatives and at least XXXX supervisor. I was assured several times that a refund had been approved and that a new Macys gift card containing the refunded amount had been expedited and would arrive by XX/XX/XXXX. Despite these promises, I never received the gift card, and my Macys order history shows no update or confirmation that a refund was processed.

I then received an email from Macys on XX/XX/year>, stating that my refund request had been denied, which directly contradicts what multiple agents and a supervisor told me during recorded phone calls. I have screenshots of the UPS delivery photo, email correspondence, and documented dates and names of the agents I spoke with. 

Macys has refused to issue the refund or provide proper proof of delivery. I paid using a Macys store gift card, and at this point, I am without my items and without a refund. They are withholding funds that rightfully belong to me without any legal or valid reason. 

I am requesting assistance in holding Macys accountable for : Failing to deliver my order properly ; Failing to provide a valid delivery confirmation ; Misleading me with false refund promises ; Refusing to refund a legitimate claim ; Withholding the value of a Macys gift card despite their own confirmation that a refund was approved.

I would like Macys to immediately issue the full refund in the form of a new Macys gift card or provide an equivalent resolution.
